title: Day 6 Lesson 2 - Video Repetition
html:
The focus of this repetition is on these two sentences:  

Sentence 1 - だれと きょうとへ　いきますか。 (dareto Kyootohe ikimaska?) = Who are you going to Kyoto with?

Sentence 2 - ひとりで　いきます。 (hitoride ikimas) = I'm going by myself.

How to use this lesson - When the repeat message shows and the video pauses, please repeat the sentence you have just heard.
